scripts.build: npm run prepare:shared && npm run compile
scripts.test: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config jest.config.cjs test/unit
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config jest.config.cjs test/integration
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:integration
scripts.sam:build: npm run prepare:shared && sam build --template-file template.yaml
scripts.sam:deploy: npm run sam:build && sam deploy --config-file samconfig.toml --config-env default
